summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LinkUp redesign. All requested features verified: 1) Community.js and Profile.js have new white card design (card-solido class with white background), 2) Exactly 3 university events exist (USP, Inteli, FGV), 3) Mobile Progresso tab does NOT show university events (only shows user progress), 4) Desktop shows university events normally in sidebar. Fixed onboarding API submission bug.

minor.issue: AI analysis via Gemini sometimes returns fallback 'Erro na análise automática' - likely API key/timeout issue
minor.note: Fallback works correctly, just without AI personalization

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed Onboarding.js: was sending {respostas: answers} but backend expects flat OnboardingResponse model

mobile_dashboard.progresso_tab: Shows ONLY progress (level, XP, streak, missions) - NO university events
mobile_dashboard.eventos_tab: Shows both personal events and university events

features_verified.svg_background: Animated SVG lines visible on all pages

seed_data_creation: University events seeded: USP (Workshop Ansiedade), FGV (Gestão Tempo), Inteli (Hackathon)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Onboarding.js was fixed to send correct payload format. AI analysis may show fallback response if Gemini API has issues. Mobile tabs (Missão, Eventos, Progresso) work correctly with university events only in Eventos tab.

mocked_apis.note: AI integration (Gemini 3 Flash) may return MOCKED/fallback responses if API key not configured or timeout occurs
